name: Client Onboarding Sequence
description: Automated email sequence triggered after a client pays their setup deposit. Guides them through intake, build, and go-live.

emails.subject: Payment confirmed — your Velocity AI build starts now, {{first_name}}
Quick form to fill out — {{first_name}}, this gets your build started
emails.notes: Sent 4 hours after payment confirmation. Gives them time to feel good about the purchase before hitting them with homework.

emails.subject: Build update — Day {{build_day}}: {{progress_percent}}% done
emails.notes: First build update sent around day 5. Keep the client engaged and excited during the build phase.

emails.subject: Almost there — Day {{build_day}}: {{progress_percent}}% complete
emails.notes: Second build update around day 10. Should be 80%+ complete. Mention training session scheduling.

emails.subject: You're live, {{first_name}} — your Velocity AI system is ready
emails.notes: Sent after training is complete and system is live. Triggers the second half of the setup fee invoice and starts the monthly subscription.
